name: list_users
description: List all users in your Clerk application. Supports filtering by email address, phone number, username, or external ID. Results are paginated with offset-based pagination. You can also sort results by creation date or last sign-in date and order ascending or descending.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of users to return per page. Default is 10, maximum is 500.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of users to skip for pagination. Default is 0.

parameters.name: email_address
parameters.description: Filter by email address(es). Pass as repeated query parameters: ?email_address=a@example.com&email_address=b@example.com

parameters.name: phone_number
parameters.description: Filter by phone number(s). Pass as repeated query parameters.

parameters.name: username
parameters.description: Filter by username(s). Pass as repeated query parameters.

parameters.name: external_id
parameters.description: Filter by external ID(s). Pass as repeated query parameters.

parameters.name: order_by
parameters.description: Sort field. Options: created_at, updated_at, last_sign_in_at, last_active_at. Prefix with + or - for ascending/descending. Default is -created_at.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Free-text search across user names, emails, and usernames.
